name: Hamburger / Ground Meat Balti
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Ground meat (hamburger, or other mince)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir-fry the minced meat in the wok for 8-12 minutes. Strain off and save the liquid. Set the meat aside.
2. Add the oil to the wok and stir-fry the garlic very quickly. Then add onion, reduce heat and stir-fry for 10 minutes, until translucent.
3. Add Balti paste and garam masala (if using). Raise heat again and stir-fry for another few minutes.
4. Add the mince to the mixture in the wok and continue stir-frying a few more minutes.
5. Lower heat and simmer uncovered for 35-40 minutes. Every now and then, add some of the reserved liquid to help keep the mixture from sticking.
6. When cooked, add coriander leaves to taste. Serve.
